chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Rev. App. No. D – 33 of 2022 Cr. Jail Appeal No. S – 77 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For orders on MA No.1546/2022 (E/A) 3. For hearing of main case 14.02.2024 Mr. Habib-ur-Rahman Shaikh, Advocate for appellants in Cr. Jail Appeal No. S-77/2022. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- No one is present on behalf of the applicant in Cr. Rev. App. No. D-33/2022. Matter, when applicant was present on 31.10.2023 without his Advocate, was adjourned with a note of caution and observation that if no one appears, the revision application would be dismissed, yet on 16.01.2024, learned Counsel did not appear and on his behalf brief was held. Today also no one is present and no intimation is received on behalf of the applicant. Accordingly, the revision application is dismissed in non-prosecution. The jail appeal, being Single Bench matter, is transmitted to the Single Bench. To be fixed as per roster. Office to place a signed copy of this order in the captioned connected matter. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
